data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for re-signing when terms update.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of re-signing when terms update, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The lack of specific evidence regarding the notification process for active climbers to re-sign after a waiver update leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of the system notifying active climbers to re-sign after waiver language updates.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for re-sign notification process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls that verify the notification process for re-signing when terms are updated.
